no-restricted-globals.name: alert
no-restricted-globals.message: alert() is BANNED. Use Button component error handling (throws from onClick) or log.error()

no-restricted-globals.name: confirm
no-restricted-globals.message: confirm() is BANNED. Use Button confirmation property or proper UI confirmation flow

no-restricted-globals.name: prompt
no-restricted-globals.message: prompt() is BANNED. Use proper form inputs

no-restricted-globals.name: toast
no-restricted-globals.message: toast() is BANNED. Use contextualized error display (Button errors, inline messages, etc.)

no-restricted-syntax.message: toast() is BANNED. Use contextualized error display in component context
